---
name: General public review
about: General critique or review feedback that does not fit another template.
title: "[Public review]: "
labels: public-review
assignees: ""
---

## Review Area

Which draft, clause, safeguard, or public-review process is this about?

## Feedback

What should be clarified, strengthened, removed, or reconsidered?

## Suggested Change

If possible, suggest concrete wording, a no-go condition, an evidence requirement, or a governance safeguard.

## Public-Review Boundary

- [ ] This issue does not include confidential information, private data, protected records, trade secrets, or materials I do not have permission to share.
- [ ] This issue does not imply endorsement, partnership, certification, official status, compliance, or approval.
